text: What if I told you the sun has a bubble around it? This bubble is called the heliosphere, and it protects us from harmful cosmic rays. The solar wind creates this protective shield, extending far beyond Pluto. But what happens when cosmic rays breach it? They can affect our technology and even our climate. Isn’t that wild? Curious to learn more about space? Follow for more science facts!
